instruction: In ~/Desktop/perm_lab, recursively set permission 640 for all regular .log files, but do not change anything under archive/ and do not modify non-.log files. Keep directory permissions unchanged.
source: 外部参考来源：Ubuntu manpage - chmod(1) (https://manpages.ubuntu.com/manpages/jammy/en/man1/chmod.1.html)

parameters.command:
printf 'a
' > ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceA/app.log; printf 'b
' > ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceA/readme.txt; printf 'c
' > ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/sub/error.log; printf 'd
' > ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/sub/run.sh; printf 'e
' > ~/Desktop/perm_lab/archive/old.log; printf 'f
' > ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/.hidden/hidden.log

chmod 600 ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceA/app.log; chmod 777 ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/sub/error.log; chmod 664 ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/.hidden/hidden.log; chmod 755 ~/Desktop/perm_lab/archive/old.log; chmod 666 ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceA/readme.txt; chmod 700 ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/sub/run.sh

command: import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5);

result.command: echo "perm_serviceA_app=$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceA/app.log 2>/dev/null)"; echo "perm_serviceB_error=$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/sub/error.log 2>/dev/null)"; echo "perm_hidden=$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/.hidden/hidden.log 2>/dev/null)"; echo "perm_archive_old=$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/perm_lab/archive/old.log 2>/dev/null)"; echo "perm_readme=$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceA/readme.txt 2>/dev/null)"; echo "perm_run=$(stat -c '%a' ~/Desktop/perm_lab/serviceB/sub/run.sh 2>/dev/null)"
